name: Foosha Village
description: A peaceful village where many journeys begin.

name: Mt. Colubo
description: Forested mountain paths, bandit camps, and hidden childhood trails.

name: Dawn Island Coast
description: Tide pools, reefs, caves, and the first real sailing lessons.

name: Shells Town
description: A Marine-controlled town with a strict base and busy harbor.

name: Orange Town
description: A rebuilding town scarred by pirate circus raids.

name: Syrup Village
description: A quiet village with forests, orchards, and suspicious shadows.

name: Gecko Islands
description: Rocky coastal islands with caves, lizards, and smugglers.

name: Baratie
description: A floating restaurant where cooks, pirates, and sea beasts collide.

name: Conomi Village
description: Orange groves, hidden tunnels, and villagers resisting Fish-Man control.

name: Arlong Park
description: A fortress of Fish-Man oppression, shark pools, coral caverns, and hidden vaults.

name: Loguetown
description: The city of beginnings and endings, filled with Marines, weapon shops, and secrets.

name: Reverse Mountain
description: A dangerous canal into the Grand Line with storms and impossible currents.

name: Twin Cape
description: A lighthouse, whale bay, and the first true Grand Line mysteries.

name: Whiskey Peak
description: A bounty hunter town disguised as a welcoming party.

name: Little Garden
description: A prehistoric jungle where giants duel and dinosaurs roam.

name: Drum Island
description: A snowy medical kingdom of blizzards, castles, and rare herbs.

name: Nanohana
description: A desert harbor full of merchants, spies, spice markets, and royal patrols.

name: Rainbase
description: Casino lights, underground cells, and Baroque Works secrets.

name: Alubarna
description: The royal capital of Alabasta, filled with guards, ruins, and political quests.

name: Yuba
description: A struggling oasis town fighting drought and sandstorms.

name: Royal Mausoleum
description: Ancient tombs, royal spirits, traps, and hidden historical relics.

name: Mock Town
description: A lawless pirate town where rumors, black markets, and sky clues begin.

name: Cricket's House
description: A salvage base full of diving quests, old stories, and golden dreams.

name: Angel Beach
description: A peaceful sky beach with dials, cloud farms, and White Sea wildlife.

name: Upper Yard
description: A sacred jungle of ruins, warriors, giant beasts, and golden secrets.

name: God's Shrine
description: A divine trial zone of priests, lightning, and collapsing cloud terrain.

name: Shandora
description: Ancient golden ruins filled with guardians, lore, and the Golden Bell.

name: Ark Maxim
description: A flying ark of thunder constructs, machinery, and Enel's legacy.

name: Water 7
description: A giant canal city of shipwrights, blueprints, rooftops, and secret tunnels.

name: Enies Lobby
description: Judicial island, CP9 agents, Buster Call events, and the Tower of Justice.

name: Thriller Bark
description: A haunted island ship with ghosts, curses, zombies, and shadow theft.

name: Sabaody Archipelago
description: Mangrove groves, bubbles, auction houses, Pacifistas, and Admiral incidents.

name: Fish-Man Island
description: An underwater kingdom of coral forests, mermaid coves, and ancient Sea King lore.

name: Punk Hazard
description: A half-burning, half-frozen laboratory island full of experiments and gas hazards.

name: Dressrosa
description: A massive kingdom of toys, colosseum fights, factories, and royal secrets.

name: Zou
description: A living elephant island with Mink warriors, forests, and ancient paths.

name: Whole Cake Island
description: A Yonko territory of candy seas, soul homies, and tea party dangers.

name: Wano
description: A closed samurai nation with Onigashima, swordsmiths, Oni bosses, and Haki trials.

name: Egghead
description: The future island of labs, Seraphim, Frontier Dome defenses, and forbidden science.

name: Elbaf
description: The land of giants, runes, Yggdrasil, frost giants, and legendary smiths.

name: Laugh Tale
description: The final island of inherited will, ancient truth, and ultimate trials.
